Cazic Thule  

Raid Encounter
  • View
  • History
  • Media
  • Discuss
  • Tools
    • Main page
    • Print this page
    • What links here
    • Recent changes
    • Wiki search


Uploaded July 24th, 2007

In the Plane of Fear: The God of Fear, Cazic Thule, wanders the northeastern area of his home Plane around the ring of fire. He (unlike his denizens) regards Iksars as his allies. (Screenshot by Kyter)

In the Plane of Time: For event information, see this quest entry. Cazic drops three items from his loot table.

In House of Thule, Upper Floors: Cazic Thule is in a deep sleep, unattackable.

In Fear Itself (group mission): Spawns as part of the task "An Offering to Thule".

In Fear Itself (raid): Cazic is the main encounter in the "Cazic's Final Stand" raid event (see this quest entry for event and loot information).

EverQuest
Wikibase™

Category: EverQuest
This page last modified 2011-05-27 14:50:54.

Level: 70
Expansion:
Effects Used:Avatar Power
Avatar Snare
Panic
NPC Added: 0000-00-00 00:00:00
NPC Last Updated: 2020-07-23 18:20:01
Known Loot:
Amulet of Necropotence
Bile Etched Obsidian Choker
Brain of Cazic-Thule
Cloak of the Fearsome
Eye of Cazic-Thule
Halo of the Enlightened
Pauldrons of Ferocity
Robe of Inspiration

Known Habitats:
  Plane of Fear
Factions Decreased:
  CazicThule
Quests:
  Conqueror of The Plane of Fear
  Necromancer Epic: Scythe of the Shadowed Soul
  Shadowknight Epic: Innoruuk's Curse
  Whistling Fists

Dropped Amulet of Necropotence last night in a DZ. Can't comment on whether or not he can drop in in OW.

[Tue Jul 21 00:01:24 2020] --Soandso has looted an Amulet of Necropotence from Cazic-Thule's corpse.--

Aradune server, classic era.
▲ Page top
Killed on Test
QuoteReply
# Apr 18 2018 at 8:42 AM Rating: Decent
YawnGod
6 posts
I just killed normal CT on Test. Usually he's The Shade of CT, but this was a rare time when I've seen normal CT in normal fearplane.

Not sure if it's because of the fableds (although there are no fableds in fearplane), but yeah. I play very casually (a few weeks per year, and not /played weeks), so my memory can fail me, but I don't remember seeing normal CT for a long, long time. I was surprised to see him up and not the shade.

Anyway, fun facts.
____________________________
Blasto wins the day.

Wish it were instance based...
QuoteReply
# Dec 18 2015 at 10:33 AM Rating: Decent

View User Forum
Scholar
30 posts
To this day, I have only ever seen this guy up twice since I joined the game back in 2001. I've never seen any other "named" up in there except golems lol... Need to convert to instanced based game play so other people have a crack at these spawns! Will it ruin economy of these SUPER OVERPRICED items? Yes... so be it.

Devs made a workaround. And would you believe it?? They still camp normal spawns for epics. It's disgusting. Someone gave me slime blood of cazic thule, randomly, to help me out. He could've sold it for 150k on my server, like those parasites of the community. But he gave it to me. Gonna do the same when I'm a higher level. Ruin their economy since they ruin our game.

Old items no longer drop from CT
QuoteReply
# Mar 22 2013 at 2:21 AM Rating: Decent
Zliz
Scholar
73 posts
Having killed CT several times over the past few years, I feel confident in stating that he no longer drops his old items, and that they are found exclusively on the three golems. Every time I've killed him, he has only dropped the new items with +100 HP/Mana and such.

# May 04 2011 at 11:15 AM Rating: Decent

▲ Page top
Fun fight for us monks
QuoteReply
# Apr 24 2011 at 12:28 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592340258737
View User Forum
2 posts
That fact that CT summons is great for us monks.. makes it much easier infact. Full PoFear spawn, smack CT.. come help your god my whatever he says.. so they come charging.. i went ahead and passed the time with impenterable while they arrived.. took id imagine like about 2m. merc just healed away.. no biggie. once i felt they were all there did wind up.. activated epic 1.0,IoT, 2nd spire, clicked tunic, glyph of cata, the whole 9 yards and then hit our ripo disc.. 10 sec later.. all mobs cept CT were dead.. 5 min later CT was dead.. very easy for a 85 monk with T3 armor from UF. wpns were fippy 1hb (dont make fun of me) and SoD tower wpn.. from event 3.. not on toon as you can see and my memory sucks lol.

everything that CT did was resisted as i have 3500aa.. fun fight.
▲ Page top
Cazic Thule -- Plane of Fear
QuoteReply
# Dec 07 2009 at 1:45 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1706487375740
View User Forum
Scholar
601 posts

Solo with healer Merc

While Checking PoF with my 85 Necro for Golems for the Warrior Epic drop, I noticed CT was up and no Golems.

Cool, lets kill him. He drops epic stuff, but I noticed on Allah afterwards, he doesn't drop the warrior drop /sigh.

Clearing the zone is pretty easy for an 85 necro. I'm not sure of the repop times but I had plenty of time for 4 tries to kill CT.

I ran out of mana 3 times. Just me and my pet with no summoned weapons and a merc. The 4th time I died. My Merc probably ran out mana before I noticed. The early attempts are good to verify all the trash mobs are dead. Since CT call to them to assist, any strays show up after a while. A simple necro evac cancelled the fight with CT and I could clean up the extra mobs.

I bound myself just outside the zone at the entrance to PoF so any deaths and I was close to the zone.

Don't forget to clear mobs on the tower inside the ring of fire. There can be lots of them although at level 85 they were no problem at all. Run inside the rooms to do a full check.

CT was pretty resistant to a lot of my spells. I ended up loading just poison spells which work the best with him, but don't have the high damage my other spells have. But I ran out of mana.

Tips:
His knock back spell is a pain so have a form of Leviatation up, it greatly reduces the effect.

He dispells bufs. Its probably a waste to rebuf a mana regen but I'd keep a pet haste spell memmed.

Necro and Shaman
OK, 4 failues. I came back the next day and CT was still up. I two boxed a friends 75 shaman.

No problems this time.
Clear the zone.
Solo CT and figure out what mobs you missed. Kill em.

Added the Shaman for a final fight.
1. Shamana Malo was great. My necro spells stuck better. I should have tried non-poison ones, but I didn't. No mana issues.
2. Shaman slow. BAD. You Can't slow CT.
3. Shaman Dots. Seemed to work fine.
4 Shaman Melee. I didn't check stats but I had her doing melee.
5. Extra Merc healer.



Zone loot i.e. gem trade in quest
With so many mobs to kill clearing the zone, I did not loot, but if you are so inclined, don't forget the class specific no trade stuff can be turned in for random gems in PoK

Quest link for gem turn-in
https://everquest.allakhazam.com/db/quest.html?quest=2459

These is some armor that drops that is not part of this quest.


▲ Page top

Cazic Thule -- Plane of Fear
QuoteReply
# Feb 04 2010 at 2:26 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1706487375740
View User Forum
Scholar
601 posts
Lets see, solo with a merc.
That would be umm... one as you say, and a merc.

And look! So it was.

Solo here means one account, one player.

But I understand, I can be pretty picky too with people.
Phew, glad we got that straight!
▲ Page top
Cazic Thule -- Plane of Fear
QuoteReply
# Mar 24 2010 at 8:04 AM Rating: Default
Szazz
6 posts
Instead of just admitting that you didnt solo it at all, you 2 boxed it with your friends shaman and had mercs x 2, you snare yourself in a reply that doesnt make any sense at all, way to go /clap

It really doesnt matter if it was one account, what matter when one soloes mobs is that there is only 1 character, imho having these mercs out aint soloing any longer either, but I would admit your great feat anyway had you duo'ed it with your necro and your merc, as that in itself is great knowledge for other necro's, that it can be done.

Writing that you soloed it is just dumb and you know it.

▲ Page top
forewarning
QuoteReply
# Mar 10 2009 at 9:52 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1717373796144
Scholar
74 posts
For those who haven't ever done this fight before and are reading up on it, just make sure before you decide to take on Cazic Thule that you go through the zone polishing off as many mobs as you can before you engage. On my first try, I made the big mistake of engaging him before I killed everything in the zone, and wound up having probably in the vicinity of 100-200 mobs on me. I managed to kill them all, but instead of taking about five minutes, the fight took me about an hour and was somewhat difficult being the essence of rage decided to join the fight and chain mezz me. Just about the only thing that saved me from certain death was barrage of arrows. By the time CT dropped, there was literally 3 mobs left standing in the zone.

Oh, and another sidenote... as every other creature in fear, hes got one big *** agro radius, so watch your step.
▲ Page top
Duo'd
QuoteReply
# Jan 12 2009 at 12:09 PM Rating: Default
Lingum
Scholar
105 posts
Duo'd with Demi-Plane/Anguish geared 75 Ench, and a similarly geared 70 Ranger. Interesting fight. No Trunk, no AON, so the loot pretty much rotted.

no more badboy!

duod him today with a 85 warrior lizard and me a 71 druid and a healer and a tank merc a piece of cake! maybe 1 minute battle! he only dropped halo of the enlighted and robe of inspiration /cry no AoN for me!

Took him down in under 5 minutes!

▲ Page top
Duo'd
QuoteReply
# Sep 07 2008 at 9:26 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591937583960
7 posts
DUo'd Him last night. 80 Ranger, 800 aa's, 16k hitpoints, 2690 ac. and 74 shaman,100 aa's, 7k hitpoints around 9k mana. took a bit of time to clear the zone, finally give up and attempted him the first time with 25 other mobs left in the zone, got him to 38% before rampage ate up the shaman, 2nd attempt only had 11 mobs in zone. Pulled him to the top of the tower, parked the shammy in a corner and tanked him just inside the room. Fight took almost 11 minutes, he had 464k hitpoints. Dropped Crimson Robe of Alendine , Halo of the Enlightened
and Cloak of the Fearsome. Was fun fight.
▲ Page top
trioed
QuoteReply
# Jun 17 2008 at 10:46 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591933069755
57 posts
trioed with 80 bst, 80 bard, 80 mage, bard tanked. 14.3k unbuffed, 3kish AC. piece of cake.

first try we only cleared half the zone for fun then attacked him, was fun. then gated out. about 50 mobs + CT.. killed about 20 of them and got CT down to 80ish, dunno wasn't paying too much attention.
▲ Page top
Easy solo
QuoteReply
# Jun 10 2008 at 6:00 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592344302265
41 posts
Golems were down, so I whacked this guy instead (didn't have his insta-clickie yet).
80 SK, 4kac with self buffs, max shielding etc, all the important AAs. Took an hour and a half to clear the zone, and 10 minutes to bring him down.
When he actually did hit me, it was mostly 150-200, with some 400-500 hits thrown in. He couldn't take my health below 98% before my lifetap procs brought me back to 100%.
I had to heal my pet at 40% because the rampage damage was wearing him down.
3 clickies is enough to counter his dispel.

Oh, and bring a tash stick if you want to use challenge/trial for power on him.
▲ Page top
duoed
QuoteReply
# Jun 01 2008 at 11:16 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593368880874
3 posts
duoed with 75 bst 692 aa's and lvl 70 zerker whole zone took couple hours but not bad imo.golems were down when we went but that wouldnt have mattered zerker woulda ate the DT's.

# May 21 2008 at 7:48 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591947522567
Scholar
50 posts
I don't know if they have changed it but we went in with 4 toons lvl 78 shd lvl 73 wizard lvl 77 ranger and a lvl 68 cleric. We pulled him and he did 93k damage to the shd right off the bat and we didn't last long enough to find out what did the 93k so if anyone know pls post

93k hit

# May 28 2008 at 8:57 AM Rating: Decent

Odds are one of the Deathtouching golems were up and CT summoned them on top of your tank. CT doesn't DT, himself.

1 post
My level 72 monk with 120 aa's and a level 75 monk with 1000+ aa's duo'd him earlier today on prexus. only one time during the fight did the 75 monk have to FD and let me take agro to wait for his mend to become usable. He didn't drop anything good, but it was a fun fight.

No outside looters
QuoteReply
# Feb 19 2008 at 1:36 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592344153519
15 posts
Killed CT today 2/17/2008. Had an alt come over to loot one of the items from CT's corpse and was not able to the whole time the corpse was waiting to expire. Something like 30mins of rot time and the alt outside the group was not allowed to loot the corpse.

I dont know if this is new or what but it made me laugh. LOL
▲ Page top
No outside looters
QuoteReply
# Mar 15 2008 at 6:38 PM Rating: Decent
-REDACTED-
Scholar
41 posts
This is SOE's way of priventing "ninja lotters" according to them. The Following is a post from Trezzt camping Dread. This sucks for those who want any items off CT as he is almost always perma camped for AoN

FYI...

I've been camping these overcamped golems off and on for my SK's Soul Leech for years and finally get one to drop, but I couldn't loot it. If you don't have loot rights when this mob dies, you're not looting from it. What a great lesson learned after just coming back from WoW to EQ... Going to get ice for my balls now.

Here's the GM's response:

Greetings Trezzt,

I am Game Master Mansus, from the EverQuest CS Department, thank you for your petition. I understand that you were not able to loot the corpse of the 'Golem Fright'. I can imagine how frustrated you must be at the moment. Please note that to avoid 'Ninja-Looting' on the servers, 'Development' has added an anti-ninja loot code on some of the NPCs on servers. This NPC is one of them. In order to loot the corpse of NPC, a raid leader has to give the looting permissions to the required players before killing the 'NPC' and only those players can loot the corpse of 'NPC' who are assign to loot the corpse. No one other than the raid leader itself can loot the corpse of the NPC if no player has been assigned the right to loot and seems that it has happened with you. I am afraid that we will not be able reimburse you the 'Soul Leech, Dark Sword of Bloodâ€™. You will have to kill the NPC once again. Also, please visit 'EverQuest Reimbursement Policy' that is located at: http://help.station.sony.com/cgi-bin/so...aqid=16215. Please feel free to file a feedback about this feature by using the /feedback command in game to send your views directly to our development team. You views and opinions regarding any of the game features will always be highly appreciated.

If you have any other queries please feel free to contact us, we will be more than happy to assist you again.

Wish you good hunting, and safe journey to the world of Norrath.

Regards,
Game Master Mansus
In Game CSR, EverQuest
Sony Online Entertainment
----------------------------
Farwarden Treygolas Mirkwood
<Northstar Legion>
Fennin Ro

Way to go SOE =(
▲ Page top
No outside looters
QuoteReply

This is SOE's way of priventing "nija lotters according to them. The Following is a post from Trezzt camping Dread. This sucks for those who want any items off CT as he is almost always perma camped for AoN

FYI...

I've been camping these overcamped golems off and on for my SK's Soul Leech for years and finally get one to drop, but I couldn't loot it. If you don't have loot rights when this mob dies, you're not looting from it. What a great lesson learned after just coming back from WoW to EQ... Going to get ice for my balls now.

Here's the GM's response:

Greetings Trezzt,

I am Game Master Mansus, from the EverQuest CS Department, thank you for your petition. I understand that you were not able to loot the corpse of the 'Golem Fright'. I can imagine how frustrated you must be at the moment. Please note that to avoid 'Ninja-Looting' on the servers, 'Development' has added an anti-ninja loot code on some of the NPCs on servers. This NPC is one of them. In order to loot the corpse of NPC, a raid leader has to give the looting permissions to the required players before killing the 'NPC' and only those players can loot the corpse of 'NPC' who are assign to loot the corpse. No one other than the raid leader itself can loot the corpse of the NPC if no player has been assigned the right to loot and seems that it has happened with you. I am afraid that we will not be able reimburse you the 'Soul Leech, Dark Sword of Bloodâ€™. You will have to kill the NPC once again. Also, please visit 'EverQuest Reimbursement Policy' that is located at: http://help.station.sony.com/cgi-bin/so...aqid=16215. Please feel free to file a feedback about this feature by using the /feedback command in game to send your views directly to our development team. You views and opinions regarding any of the game features will always be highly appreciated.

If you have any other queries please feel free to contact us, we will be more than happy to assist you again.

Wish you good hunting, and safe journey to the world of Norrath.

Regards,
Game Master Mansus
In Game CSR, EverQuest
Sony Online Entertainment
----------------------------
Farwarden Treygolas Mirkwood
<Northstar Legion>
Fennin Ro
▲ Page top
Now THAT Was Fun!
QuoteReply
# Feb 10 2008 at 8:51 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1644797901812
Scholar
39 posts
Duo'd today with a tap-tanking 80 Necro and an 80 Wizard, both with approx 13k HP unbuffed and 16k mana. Resisted Panic every time and snare was a non-issue, since everytime I got flung I was summoned right back to his feet. The dispell was spiffy, and I got a little nervous when I was down to 10% mana and he was at 16%, but we squeezed it out. After 15 minutes and 32 seconds, he died to a pet killshot (lol) and I got my "I Tanked Cazic Thule and All I Got Was This Lousy Robe of Inspiration" t-shirt as a souvenir.

Quite possibly the most fun I've had in a long, long time.
▲ Page top
Duoed.
QuoteReply
# Jan 17 2008 at 6:12 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591937177034
6 posts
Duoed with 80 Beastlord 15k hp unbuffed 14k mana and 80 berserker probably about 10k hp unbuffed.. accidentally agroed him while clearin the zone so got about half of the zone summoned. managed to survive and kill him though.

Spawn Time

Spawn rate and location?
QuoteReply
# Sep 28 2007 at 11:12 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592341143092
50 posts
I've been trying to talk and do my turn in with cazic thule for my whistling fists, but have been unable to find him (maybe the spurt of recent server resets have had to do with that though)... I've been getting contradictory information on some stuff, so if anyone can confirm what's true and what's not, that would be great:

1.) Is his spawn rate 3 days or a week?

2.) Where does cazic thule wander? I've had people tell me around the ring of fire, but also in the NE corner (ring of fire is in the NW corner)... does he wander around both, or maybe (I'm thinking) just in the north area in general?

Also, is there any way to tell if he's up (someone said when he's up he shouts things out to the whole zone)

EDIT:

I answered two of my questions:

He wanders in the NE corner, where the phoboplasms and nightmares are. If you hang around the north of the temple (which is a safe spot), he wanders near it to the north of it and to the south of it, and he'll stand in two locations that are relatively wanderming moster free (but not entirely).

And the shouting thing, he does shout, though it's not very frequently (maybe every 15 minutes or so)

Edited, Oct 3rd 2007 1:48pm by zigip
▲ Page top
Spawn rate and location?
QuoteReply
# Oct 16 2007 at 12:21 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592265278976
Scholar
130 posts
Various posts here and other places give the spawn rate as 3 or 5 or 7 days. I won't say those posts were wrong...they could have been right at the time of their posting, as EQ has been known to change things without warning. What I can say is that I was in a grp that killed him at about 10pm on Friday night 10/12/07. Since he did not drop the epic 1.0 sword piece that my sk needed, I camped my sk there. I checked the zone every once in awhile the following Saturday, Sunday and Monday. He was not up (yelling his silly "infidel" line zonewide) at 11PM on that Monday...but a few hours later at 2AM on Tuesday he was yelling his brag. So until EQ changes things, his spawn rate is close to 3 days.
▲ Page top
Spawn rate and location?
QuoteReply
# Nov 03 2007 at 11:30 AM Rating: Decent
shadowsedge
Scholar
298 posts
There are 2 spawn timers. 1st timer is 3 days and CT won't spawn during that time. 2nd spawn timer is random and CT may spawn at anytime. They made it this way on several of the mobs so farmers can't know exactly when a mob will spawn and have to sit around once the 1st spawn timer is up.
____________________________
I know you believe you understand what you think I said, but I am not sure you realize that what you thought you heard was not what I meant.
